name: Luxury Room
metatitle: Luxury Rooms at Devrana – Elegance & Modern Amenities
metades: Experience premium comfort in the Luxury Rooms at Devrana. Spacious interiors, warm aesthetics, and modern amenities designed for a peaceful and relaxing stay.
description: Luxury suite with living area, and premium room service.

name: Cottage
metades: Stay in beautifully designed Luxury cottages at Devrana. Perfect for couples and families seeking privacy, greenery, and a peaceful resort experience.
description: Luxury suite with living area, and premium room service.

name: Family Suite
metatitle: Family Suites at Devrana – Spacious, Comfortable & Ideal for Groups
metades: Enjoy a spacious and well-designed Family Suite at Devrana. Perfect for families and groups looking for comfort, privacy, and a premium resort experience.
description: Spacious room with king-size bed, balcony view, and complimentary breakfast.
